description: AI-generated holiday illustration. The image shows a nighttime church scene in falling snow: a stone church with glowing arched stained-glass windows and an illuminated round rose window, a tall decorated and lit Christmas tree topped with a star at left, leafless snow-covered trees, and a crowd of people in winter coats gathered on the steps and walkway. Centered over the scene in a white serif font is the text 'Joy to the World'. No agency seal is visible. The tweet text reads 'Let Earth Receive Her King.'
